title: Have You Seen My Tama?
overview: Welcome to Third Street, where a lot of cats and dogs live! Tama goes missing, and his friends try to find him.

title: Dog Meeting
overview: A new dog moves in to the neighborhood, but he looks really tough.

title: Our Waiha
overview: The cats try to find their warm paradise.

title: My Name Is Bull
overview: Bull tries his best to be cool, but then he meets Momo.

title: Peace
overview: Gon teaches Kuro something interesting about cats and dogs.

title: Going to the Beach
overview: Tama and Pochi get lost again and end up at the beach.

title: The Strongest Guy on Third Street
overview: Koma and Tora argue about who the strongest person on Third Street is, so they hold a tournament!

title: The Weakest Guy on Third Street
overview: Because of the tournament, a certain someone feels like he was the weakest guy on Third Street.

title: Tama's Job
overview: What does Tama do all day while the other cats and dogs are working?

title: My Name Is Gon
overview: Gon has a one One Dog Show where he can never get bored.

title: Dog Police / Dog Police 2
overview: Kuro patrols Third Street to protect the peace.

title: Tora's First Love
overview: Tora, Pochi, and Tama venture inside to an abandoned house.

title: Let's Take a Bath
overview: It's Pet Day at Matsu Bath, so all the cats and dogs enjoy a bath together.

title: Dog Police Continued
overview: Momo has gotten in trouble with the Dog Police.

title: Battle of Dogs and Cats, Part One / Battle of Dogs and Cats, Part Two
overview: The Seventh Street Young Kings have their sights set on taking over Third Street. Can the Third Street Crazy Cats defend their territory?

title: Night Picnic
overview: The Third Street cats and dogs enjoy a night picnic together.

title: Tama Gets Kidnapped
overview: Tama gets kidnapped and the cats and dogs of Third Street are on hot pursuit!

title: Surprise Furball
overview: Momo's button flies off as she catches it in the air. What could be causing this?

title: Cat Cafe Violet
overview: The cats and dogs of Third Street hear about a new cat café in the next town over.

title: Festival Music
overview: The Summer Festival is happening on Third Street, but there's something about the festival music that reminds Nora of his past.

title: He's in Town
overview: An AIBO has come to Third Street looking for Tama.

title: Nora and the Kitten
overview: Nora finds a stray kitten and can't help but take him under his wing for a little while.

title: Don't Fall Asleep
overview: Tama and Tora try not to fall asleep so they can try to get tasty treats.

title: Third Street Quiz
overview: Gon quizzes Tama on how well he knows Third Street.

title: Beh and Bull are BFFs
overview: Beh and Bull go on an adventure and they become best friends.

title: Tama's True Identity
overview: Tama has discovered his true identity! What could it be?

title: Cat Meeting
overview: The cats gather and have a meeting regarding the strangeness of humans.

title: My Treasure
overview: Tama and the gang find out what Takeshi's and Kuramochi's treasures are.
